Footing.description: Footing of the retaining wall. PadFoundation: 2D element representing a pad foundation for structural analysis. The PadFoundation is a planar surface object defined by edges and an ISurfaceProperty.

RetainedHeight.description: The retained height of soil measured from the bottom of the wall Footing.

CoverDepth.description: The distance from top of Footing to finished floor level on the exposed face.

RetentionAngle.description: A property of the material being retained measured from the horizontal plane. Property has a quantity of type Angle measured in [rad].

GroundWaterDepth.description: The distance from the base of the Footing to ground water level.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
